runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 295m in 16.95 last start, beating Rovaniemi. Can measure up again with the right run.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.21) in a Class 5, finishing a 5 length sixth. Strong record off the draw with seven wins and five minors from 15 starts. Looks tested.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.44) when sixth over 295m at this track in a Class 4. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and seven minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won comfortably by 3.5 lengths at this track (16.86) beating Ava in a Class 5 on April 2. Worth consideration on best form.
